title: cyperus tenuis var. eurystachys
intro: Cyperus tenuis var. eurystachys, also known as slender sedge or slender umbrella sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus tenuis var. eurystachys include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
